output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        // Serialize packet_id with little-endian conversion
        const auto swapped_id = hexi::endian::native_to_little(packet_id);
        stream.put(&swapped_id, sizeof(swapped_id));
        
        // Serialize username with a 2-byte prefix
        stream.put(hexi::prefixed(username, 2));
        
        // Serialize scores with a 2-byte prefix and each in little-endian
        stream.put(hexi::prefixed(scores.size(), 2));
        for (const auto& score : scores) {
            const auto swapped_score = hexi::endian::native_to_little(score);
            stream.put(&swapped_score, sizeof(swapped_score));
        }
        
        // Serialize metadata as a null-terminated string
        stream.put(hexi::null_terminated(metadata));
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_packet(const NetworkPacket& packet) {
    hexi::dynamic_buffer buffer;
    hexi::stream stream(buffer);
    packet.serialise(stream);
    return std::vector<uint8_t>(buffer.data(), buffer.data() + buffer.size());
}
```</answer>

For deserialize_packet:

```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
};

NetworkPacket deserialize_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::exception_tag except_tag;
    auto stream = hexi::stream_adaptors(buffer, except_tag);

    NetworkPacket np;

    // Read packet_id
    uint32_t packet_id = 0;
    stream >> hexi::endian::le_to_native(packet_id);
    np.packet_id = packet_id;

    // Read username with prefixed length
    uint32_t username_len = 0;
    stream >> hexi::endian::le_to_native(username_len);
    np.username.resize_and_overwrite(username_len, [&](char* data, std::size_t size) {
        hexi::read(buffer, data, size);
        return size;
    });

    // Read score count
    uint32_t score_count = 0;
    stream >> hexi::endian::le_to_native(score_count);
    np.scores.resize(score_count);
    hexi::read(buffer, np.scores.data(), score_count * sizeof(uint32_t));

    // Read metadata as null terminated
    auto pos = buffer.find_first_of(std::byte{0});
    if(pos != buffer.npos) {
        np.metadata.resize_and_overwrite(pos, [&](char* data, std::size_t size) {
            buffer.copy(data, pos);
            return pos;
        });
        // Skip null terminator and remaining bytes
        hexi::skip(stream, 1); // skip null terminator
    }

    // Skip remaining bytes
    hexi::skip(stream, stream.read_max());

    return np;
}
```

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
};

NetworkPacket deserialize_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::exception_tag except_tag;
    auto stream = hexi::stream_adaptors(buffer, except_tag);

    NetworkPacket np;

    // Read packet_id
    uint32_t packet_id = 0;
    stream >> hexi::endian::le_to_native(packet_id);
    np.packet_id = packet_id;

    // Read username with prefixed length
    uint32_t username_len = 0;
    stream >> hexi::endian::le_to_native(username_len);
    np.username.resize_and_overwrite(username_len, [&](char* data, std::size_t size) {
        hexi::read(buffer, data, size);
        return size;
    });

    // Read score count
    uint32_t score_count = 0;
    stream >> hexi::endian::le_to_native(score_count);
    np.scores.resize(score_count);
    hexi::read(buffer, np.scores.data(), score_count * sizeof(uint32_t));

    // Read metadata as null terminated
    auto pos = buffer.find_first_of(std::byte{0});
    if(pos != buffer.npos) {
        np.metadata.resize_and_overwrite(pos, [&](char* data, std::size_t size) {
            buffer.copy(data, pos);
            return pos;
        });
        // Skip null terminator
        hexi::skip(stream, 1);
    }

    // Skip remaining bytes
    hexi::skip(stream, stream.read_max());

    return np;
}

struct PacketInfo {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string_view username;
};

PacketInfo extract_packet_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    PacketInfo pi;

    // Read packet_id via span
    const auto packet_id_span = buffer.first(4);
    pi.packet_id = 0;
    memcpy(&pi.packet_id, packet_id_span.data(), 4);
    pi.packet_id = hexi::endian::le_to_native(pi.packet_id);

    hexi::exception_tag except_tag;
    auto stream = hexi::stream_adaptors(buffer, except_tag);

    // Read username with prefixed 4-byte length
    uint32_t username_len = 0;
    stream >> hexi::endian::le_to_native(username_len);
    pi.username = { reinterpret_cast<const char*>(buffer.data() + 8), username_len };
    hexi::skip(stream, username_len);

    // Skip scores
    uint32_t score_count = 0;
    stream >> hexi::endian::le_to_native(score_count);
    hexi::skip(stream, score_count * sizeof(uint32_t));

    return pi;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer_sequence.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <span>
#include <cstdint>

struct MessageHeader {
    std::uint16_t message_type;
    std::uint32_t body_length;
    std::uint32_t footer;
};

MessageHeader read_header_and_skip_body(const std::span<const std::uint8_t> buffer) {
    MessageHeader header{};
    
    // Validate buffer size
    if(buffer.size() < 2 + 4 + 4) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Buffer too small to contain header/footer"));
    }

    // Read message_type with endian conversion
    hexi::read(buffer.data() + 0, &header.message_type, sizeof(header.message_type));
    header.message_type = hexi::endian::le_to_native(header.message_type);

    // Read body_length with endian conversion
    hexi::read(buffer.data() + sizeof(header.message_type), 
               &header.body_length, sizeof(header.body_length));
    header.body_length = hexi::endian::le_to_native(header.body_length);

    // Skip body_data if present
    const auto min_required_size = 2 + 4 + 4;
    if(buffer.size() < min_required_size + header.body_length) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Buffer too small to contain full message"));
    }
    hexi::skip(buffer.data() + sizeof(header.message_type) + sizeof(header.body_length), 
              header.body_length);

    // Read footer with endian conversion
    hexi::read(buffer.data() + sizeof(header.message_type) + sizeof(header.body_length) + header.body_length,
               &header.footer, sizeof(header.footer));
    header.footer = hexi::endian::le_to_native(header.footer);

    return header;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <cstddef>

const uint8_t* get_read_pointer(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    return buffer.data();
}

uint8_t* get_write_pointer(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    return buffer.data() + buffer.size();
}

struct BufferInfo {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

BufferInfo check_buffer_space(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    BufferInfo info;
    info.readable_size = buffer.size();
    info.free_space = buffer.capacity() - buffer.size();
    return info;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct DataResult {
    uint8_t data_type;
    std::vector<uint32_t> int_items;
    std::vector<float> float_items;
};

DataResult preview_and_read_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    DataResult result;
    
    if (buffer.size() < 1) {
        return result;
    }
    
    result.data_type = buffer[0];
    
    if (buffer.size() < 5) {
        return result;
    }
    
    hexi::buffer_adaptor< const std::span<const uint8_t> > adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    
    uint32_t item_count = 0;
    stream.get(&item_count, sizeof(item_count));
    
    const auto min_req_size = 1 + sizeof(item_count) + item_count * (result.data_type == 0 ? sizeof(uint32_t) : sizeof(float));
    if (buffer.size() < min_req_size) {
        return result;
    }
    
    if (result.data_type == 0) {
        result.int_items.resize(item_count);
        stream.get(result.int_items.data(), item_count * sizeof(uint32_t));
    } else {
        result.float_items.resize(item_count);
        stream.get(result.float_items.data(), item_count * sizeof(float));
    }
    
    return result;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

bool write_data_with_check(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint32_t>& items) {
    const auto required_size = sizeof(header) + items.size() * sizeof(uint32_t);
    if (buffer.size() < required_size) {
        return false;
    }

    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> buffer_sequence(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer_sequence);

    stream.put(&header, sizeof(header));
    stream.put_container(items);

    return true;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <concepts>
#include <span>
#include <cassert>
#include <cstddef>

struct PacketHeader {
    uint32_t magic;
    uint16_t version;
    uint16_t flags;
};

constexpr auto read_header_with_span(const std::span<const char> buffer) -> PacketHeader {
    constexpr auto header_size = sizeof(PacketHeader);
    assert(buffer.size() >= header_size && "Chained buffer too small!");
    
    hexi::buffer_adaptor< const char > buffer_read(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer_read);
    
    PacketHeader header{};
    stream >> header.magic >> header.version >> header.flags;
    
    // Convert from little-endian if needed (assuming buffer stores in little-endian)
    header.magic = hexi::endian::le_to_native(header.magic);
    header.version = hexi::endian::le_to_native(header.version);
    header.flags = hexi::endian::le_to_native(header.flags);
    
    return header;
}
```</answer>

};

std::vector<uint8_t> write_and_serialise_packet(uint32_t header, const UserData& data) {

    return target;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size>
void write_to_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<block_size>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    char header_bytes[4];
    memcpy(header_bytes, &header, sizeof(header));
    buffer.write(header_bytes, sizeof(header));
    buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

template<size_t block_size>
struct BufferData {
    uint32_t header;
    std::vector<uint8_t> data;
};

template<size_t block_size>
BufferData<> read_from_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<block_size>& buffer, size_t data_length) {
    BufferData<> result;
    char header_buf[4];
    buffer.read(header_buf, sizeof(header_buf));
    memcpy(&result.header, header_buf, sizeof(result.header));
    result.data.resize_and_overwrite(data_length, [&](char* target, std::size_t size) {
        buffer.read(target, size);
        return size;
    });
    return result;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> peek_data_from_buffer(const hexi::dynamic_buffer<block_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_peek) {
    const auto read_ptr = buffer.read_ptr();
    const auto actual_read_size = std::min(bytes_to_peek, buffer.size());
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(actual_read_size);
    memcpy(destination.data(), read_ptr, actual_read_size);
    return destination;
}
```</answer>

}

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/detail/intrusive_storage.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_data_without_consuming(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    const auto read_ptr = storage.read_ptr();
    const size_t read_size = storage.size();
    size_t copy_size = std::min(read_size, bytes_to_preview);
    std::vector<uint8_t> dest(copy_size);
    memcpy(dest.data(), read_ptr + storage.read_offset(), copy_size);
    return dest;
}

template<size_t block_size>
struct BufferStatus {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

template<size_t block_size>
BufferStatus<block_size> check_buffer_status(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage) {
    BufferStatus<block_size> status;
    status.readable_size = storage.size();
    const auto write_offset = storage.write_offset();
    const auto allocated_blocks = (write_offset + block_size - 1) / block_size;
    status.free_space = allocated_blocks * block_size - write_offset;
    return status;
}

template<size_t block_size>
void reset_buffer(hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage) {
    storage.clear();
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <filesystem>

std::vector<uint8_t> read_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(bytes_to_read);
    hexi::file_buffer file_buffer(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::buffer_sequence::read);
    file_buffer.read(destination.data(), bytes_to_read);
    return destination;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> preview_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(bytes_to_preview);
    hexi::file_buffer file_buffer(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::buffer_sequence::read);
    file_buffer.copy(destination.data(), bytes_to_preview);
    return destination;
}

void write_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    hexi::file_buffer file_buffer(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::buffer_sequence::write);
    file_buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

size_t get_file_size(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer file_buffer(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::buffer_sequence::read);
    return file_buffer.size();
}
```</answer>

    return target;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
struct BufferInfo {
    size_t capacity;
    size_t current_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

BufferInfo<1024> get_buffer_info(const hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, 1024>& buffer) {
    BufferInfo<1024> info;
    info.capacity = 1024;
    info.current_size = buffer.size();
    info.free_space = info.capacity - info.current_size;
    return info;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_buffer_data(const hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    const auto read_ptr = buffer.read_ptr();
    const auto read_size = buffer.read_size();
    const auto actual_size = std::min(bytes_to_preview, read_size);

    std::vector<uint8_t> dest(actual_size);
    memcpy(dest.data(), read_ptr, actual_size);
    return dest;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/stream_base.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>

size_t get_stream_size(const hexi::pmc::stream_base& stream) {
    return stream.size();
}

bool is_stream_empty(const hexi::pmc::stream_base& stream) {
    return stream.size() == 0;
}

struct StreamInfo {
    hexi::stream_state state;
    size_t buffer_size;
    bool is_empty;
};

StreamInfo get_stream_state_info(const hexi::pmc::stream_base& stream) {
    StreamInfo info{};
    info.state = stream.state();
    info.buffer_size = stream.size();
    info.is_empty = info.buffer_size == 0;
    return info;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void write_data_to_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, uint32_t value, const void* data, std::size_t length) {
    buffer.write(&value, sizeof(value));
    buffer.write(data, length);
}

void read_data_from_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, uint32_t& value, void* data, std::size_t length) {
    buffer.read(&value, sizeof(value));
    buffer.read(data, length);
}

struct BufferInfo {
    std::size_t size;
    std::size_t free_space;
};

BufferInfo get_buffer_info(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    auto& bytes = buffer.str();
    return {
        buffer.size(),
        bytes->capacity() - buffer.size()
    };
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void peek_data_from_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, void* data, std::size_t length) {
    buffer.copy(data, length);
}

template<typename T>
void peek_value_from_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, T& value) {
    buffer.copy< T >(value);
}

bool peek_and_compare(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, const void* expected, std::size_t length) {
    std::vector<std::byte> target(length);
    buffer.copy(target.data(), length);
    
    std::vector<std::byte> expected_vec(length);
    memcpy(expected_vec.data(), expected, length);
    
    return target == expected_vec;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

std::size_t find_byte_in_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::byte val) {
    for (std::size_t i = 0; i < buffer.size(); ++i) {
        if (buffer[i] == val) {
            return i;
        }
    }
    return hexi::pmc::buffer_read::npos;
}

std::size_t find_delimiter_position(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::byte delimiter) {
    for (std::size_t i = 0; i < buffer.size(); ++i) {
        if (buffer[i] == delimiter) {
            return i;
        }
    }
    return hexi::pmc::buffer_read::npos;
}

bool check_buffer_contains(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::byte val) {
    for (const std::byte& byte : buffer) {
        if (byte == val) {
            return true;
        }
    }
    return false;
}

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void skip_bytes_in_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::size_t bytes) {

}

    uint16_t message_type;
    uint32_t body_length;
};

MessageHeader read_header_and_skip_body(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    char header[6];
    buffer.get(header, sizeof(header));
    
    MessageHeader msg_header;
    msg_header.message_type = ntohs(*reinterpret_cast<uint16_t*>(header));
    msg_header.body_length = ntohl(*reinterpret_cast<uint32_t*>(header + 2));
    
    buffer.skip(msg_header.body_length);
    return msg_header;
}
```</answer>

        .is_empty = buffer.empty()
    };

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

using namespace hexi::detail;

template<typename T>
std::size_t encode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, T value) {
    std::size_t written = 0;
    while(value > 0x7f) {
        const std::uint8_t byte = (value & 0x7f) | 0x80;
        writer.put(&byte, 1);
        value >>= 7;
        ++written;
    }
    const std::uint8_t byte = value & 0x7f;
    writer.put(&byte, 1);
    return ++written;
}

template<typename T>
T decode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    int shift { 0 };
    T value { 0 };
    std::uint8_t byte { 0 };

    do {
        byte = 0; // clear in case an error occurs
        reader.get(&byte, 1);
        value |= (static_cast<T>(byte & 0x7f) << shift);
        shift += 7;
    } while(byte & 0x80);

    return value;
}

template<typename T>
bool encode_decode_roundtrip(T original_value) {
    std::vector<std::uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer writer(adaptor);
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader reader(adaptor);

    const std::size_t bytes_written = encode_varint<T>(writer, original_value);
    if (bytes_written == static_cast<std::size_t>(-1)) {
        return false;
    }

    T decoded_value = decode_varint<T>(reader);
    return decoded_value == original_value;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <string_view>

void write_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream, const std::string& str) {
    stream << hexi::prefixed_varint(str);
}

std::string read_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream) {
    std::string_view view;
    stream >> hexi::prefixed_varint(view);
    return std::string(view);
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <array>
#include <cstdint>

using namespace hexi::detail;

template<std::size_t Size>
constexpr auto create_filled_array(std::uint8_t value) {
    std::array<std::uint8_t, Size> target{};
    for (std::size_t i = 0; i < Size; ++i) {
        target[i] = value;
    }
    return target;
}

bool verify_filled_array(const auto& arr, std::uint8_t expected_value) {
    for (const auto& elem : arr) {
        if (elem != expected_value) {
            return false;
        }
    }
    return true;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct UnderrunInfo {
    std::size_t read_size;
    std::size_t total_read;
    std::size_t buff_size;
    bool occurred;
};

UnderrunInfo catch_buffer_underrun() {
    try {
        // Simulate buffer underrun by reading more than available
        std::vector<std::byte> buffer(5);
        hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>> adaptor(buffer);
        adaptor.read(nullptr, 10); // This triggers buffer_underrun
    } catch(hexi::buffer_underrun& e) {
        return {
            e.read_size(),   // Size requested during read
            e.total_read(),  // Total bytes read before this attempt
            e.size(),        // Current buffer size
            true
        };
    }
    return { 0, 0, 0, false };
}

UnderrunInfo safe_read_with_underrun_check(
    hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer,
    void* destination,
    std::size_t length) {
    try {
        buffer.read(destination, length);
        return { 0, 0, 0, false };
    } catch(hexi::buffer_underrun& e) {
        return {
            e.read_size(),   // Size requested during read
            e.total_read(),  // Total bytes read before this attempt
            e.size(),        // Current buffer size
            true
        };
    }
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstddef>

struct ExceptionDetails {
    std::size_t read_size;
    std::size_t total_read;
    std::size_t limit_or_size;
    std::string message;
};

ExceptionDetails extract_underrun_info(const hexi::buffer_underrun& e) {
    return {
        e.read_size(),
        e.total_read(),
        e.buff_size(),
        e.what()
    };
}

ExceptionDetails extract_read_limit_info(const hexi::stream_read_limit& e) {
    return {
        e.read_size(),
        e.total_read(),
        e.read_limit(),
        e.what()
    };
}

std::string get_exception_message(const hexi::exception& e) {
    return e.what();
}

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct CompactPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::vector<std::string> tags;
    std::string data;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_compact_packet(const CompactPacket& packet) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;

    // Serialize packet ID as 4-byte big-endian
    uint32_t big_endian_id = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.packet_id);
    buffer.resize_and_overwrite(sizeof(big_endian_id));
    memcpy(buffer.data() + buffer.size(), &big_endian_id, sizeof(big_endian_id));

    // Serialize tags with prefixed_varint encoding
    hexi::prefixed_varint_encode(buffer, packet.tags.size());
    for (const auto& tag : packet.tags) {
        hexi::prefixed_varint_encode(buffer, tag);
    }

    // Serialize data with prefixed_varint encoding
    hexi::prefixed_varint_encode(buffer, packet.data);

    return buffer;
}

CompactPacket deserialize_compact_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    CompactPacket packet;
    size_t offset = 0;

    // Check buffer size for packet ID
    if (buffer.size() < sizeof(uint32_t)) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::buffer_underrun(buffer.size(), sizeof(uint32_t)));
    }

    // Deserialize packet ID
    uint32_t big_endian_id = 0;
    memcpy(&big_endian_id, buffer.data() + offset, sizeof(big_endian_id));
    offset += sizeof(big_endian_id);
    packet.packet_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(big_endian_id);

    // Deserialize tags
    int tags_count = 0;
    hexi::prefixed_varint_decode(buffer, offset, &tags_count);
    offset += hexi::prefixed_decode<1>(buffer, offset).second; // Skip prefix bytes
    const auto varint_size = hexi::varint_decode<size_t>(buffer, offset);
    offset += varint_size;
    if (offset > buffer.size()) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::buffer_underrun(buffer.size(), offset));
    }
    packet.tags.resize(tags_count);
    for (int i = 0; i < tags_count; ++i) {
        std::string tag;
        hexi::prefixed_varint_decode(buffer, offset, &tag);
        packet.tags[i] = std::move(tag);
    }

    // Deserialize data
    hexi::prefixed_varint_decode(buffer, offset, &packet.data);

    return packet;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <concepts>
#include <string>
#include <type_traits>
#include <utility>
#include <cassert>
#include <cstddef>
#include <cstdint>

struct PaddedData {
    uint16_t header;
    std::string data;
    uint32_t footer;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_with_padding(const PaddedData& packet) {
    hexi::dynamic_buffer buffer;

    // Write header
    buffer.write(&packet.header, sizeof(packet.header));

    // Write data with fixed-length prefix
    const auto data_len = static_cast<std::uint32_t>(packet.data.size());
    buffer.write(hexi::endian::native_to_little(data_len));
    buffer.write(packet.data.data(), packet.data.size());

    // Write 16-byte padding filled with 0x00
    hexi::fill<16> padding(0x00);
    buffer.write(padding.data(), padding.size());

    // Write footer
    buffer.write(&packet.footer, sizeof(packet.footer));

    return buffer.to_vector();
}

#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
#include <vector>

struct PoolObject {
    int id;
    double value;
    
    PoolObject() : id(0), value(0.0) {}
    PoolObject(int i, double v) : id(i), value(v) {}
};

std::vector<PoolObject*> create_object_pool(hexi::block_allocator<PoolObject, 10>& allocator) {
    std::vector<PoolObject*> pool;
    for (int i = 1; i <= 3; ++i) {
        PoolObject* obj = allocator.allocate();
        obj->id = i;
        obj->value = static_cast<double>(i) * 1.5; // Different values for demonstration
        pool.push_back(obj);
    }
    return pool;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_base.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstddef>

class CustomBuffer : public hexi::pmc::buffer_base {
    std::vector<std::byte> data_;
    
public:
    std::size_t size() const override { 
        return data_.size(); 
    }

    [[nodiscard]]
    bool empty() const override { 
        return data_.empty(); 
    }

    // Helper method to add data (for testing)
    void add_data(const void* source, std::size_t length) {
        const std::byte* bytes = static_cast<const std::byte*>(source);
        data_.insert(data_.end(), bytes, bytes + length);
    }
    
    // Helper method to clear data (for testing)
    void clear() {
        data_.clear();
    }
};
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_write_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct TypedData {
    uint32_t id;
    int16_t value;
    double ratio;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> write_typed_data(const TypedData& data) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_write_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    adaptor.write(data.id);
    adaptor.write(data.value);
    adaptor.write(data.ratio);
    return buffer;
}

TypedData read_typed_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    TypedData data;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    adaptor.read(&data.id);
    adaptor.read(&data.value);
    adaptor.read(&data.ratio);
    return data;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_write_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/stream_base.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/concepts.h>
#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <ranges>
#include <vector>

std::size_t write_multiple_chunks(const std::vector<std::vector<uint8_t>>& chunks) {
    hexi::pmc::dynamic_buffer buffer;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_write& buffer_write = buffer;
    std::size_t total_write = 0;

    for (const auto& chunk : chunks) {
        // Ensure buffer has enough space
        buffer_write.resize_and_overwrite(total_write + chunk.size(), [](char*, size) {
            return size;
        });

        // Check free space and write
        if (buffer_write.free() >= chunk.size()) {
            buffer_write.write(chunk.data(), chunk.size());
            total_write += chunk.size();
        } else {
            // In practice, this shouldn't happen due to prior resize
            total_write += chunk.size();
        }
    }

    return total_write;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> read_partial_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer, std::size_t chunk_size) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor read_adaptor(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    std::vector<uint8_t> result;

    while (read_adaptor.size() > 0) {
        const std::size_t read_len = std::min(read_adaptor.size(), chunk_size);
        result.resize_and_overwrite(read_len, [&](char* target, std::size_t size) {
            read_adaptor.read(target, size);
            return size;
        });
    }

    return result;
}

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <vector>
#include <span>
#include <cstdint>

struct ProtocolPacket {
    uint32_t message_id;
    std::vector<uint16_t> data_values;
    uint32_t checksum;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_protocol_packet(const ProtocolPacket& packet) {
    hexi::binary_stream stream;
    
    // Serialize message_id with endianness conversion
    const auto swapped_id = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.message_id);
    stream.put(&swapped_id, sizeof(swapped_id));
    
    // Serialize data_values with endianness conversion
    std::vector<uint16_t> swapped_data;
    swapped_data.reserve(packet.data_values.size());
    for (const auto& value : packet.data_values) {
        swapped_data.push_back(hexi::endian::native_to_big(value));
    }
    stream.put_container(swapped_data);
    
    // Serialize checksum with endianness conversion
    const auto swapped_checksum = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.checksum);
    stream.put(&swapped_checksum, sizeof(swapped_checksum));
    
    return stream.str();
}

ProtocolPacket deserialize_protocol_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer);
    ProtocolPacket packet;
    
    // Deserialize message_id
    uint32_t swapped_id = 0;
    stream.get(&swapped_id, sizeof(swapped_id));
    packet.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(swapped_id);
    
    // Deserialize data_values count
    uint32_t data_count = 0;
    stream.get(&data_count, sizeof(data_count));
    data_count = hexi::endian::big_to_native(data_count);
    
    // Deserialize data_values with endianness conversion
    packet.data_values.resize(data_count);
    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < data_count; ++i) {
        uint16_t swapped_val = 0;
        stream.get(&swapped_val, sizeof(swapped_val));
        packet.data_values[i] = hexi::endian::big_to_native(swapped_val);
    }
    
    // Deserialize checksum
    uint32_t swapped_checksum = 0;
    stream.get(&swapped_checksum, sizeof(swapped_checksum));
    packet.checksum = hexi::endian::big_to_native(swapped_checksum);
    
    return packet;
}

struct ProtocolHeader {
    uint32_t message_id;
};

ProtocolHeader extract_protocol_header(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer);
    ProtocolHeader header{};
    
    // Read message_id with endianness conversion
    uint32_t swapped_id = 0;
    stream.get(&swapped_id, sizeof(swapped_id));
    header.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(swapped_id);
    
    // Skip remaining header data (if any)
    stream.skip(sizeof(swapped_id));
    
    return header;
}
```</answer>
